rows.notes: Row missed by gemini-flash. Correctly identified by gpt-5-mini as a header representing the year in the left margin. Visual verification confirms its presence and type.

Selected gemini-flash's description based on visual verification. The word clearly starts with 'Collecta' (not 'Soluta' as gpt-5-mini had) and ends with 'continued' (not 'continu'd'). Both agreed on row type and no amounts.

Amounts agreed by consensus across both extractors. Description 'Bro' over' from gemini-flash chosen over gpt-5-mini's 'Bro't over' based on visual verification of the apostrophe placement and letter forms.

rows.description: Downs — Glege Gardiner. p. qr. Nov. 20. 1820
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash chosen for accuracy; gpt-5-mini misread 'Glege Gardiner' as 'College gardener' and 'Nov. 20' as 'No.29' based on visual verification.
rows.english_description: Receipt recorded under 'Downs' (entry dated 20 November 1820), labelled with a quarterly note.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt recorded under 'Downs' (entry dated 20 November 1820), labelled with a quarterly note, amounting to £8 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by consensus. Description from gemini-flash chosen; gpt-5-mini misread the date as '29' instead of '20', and the ditto mark pattern was more accurately captured by gemini-flash based on visual verification.
rows.english_description: Same receipt as the previous entry (ditto) dated 20 May 1821—a quarterly-labelled collection.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Same receipt as the previous entry (ditto) dated 20 May 1821— a quarterly-labelled collection, amounting to £8 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for amounts and description. Visual inspection clearly shows '12' shillings. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '2' shillings, and its note claiming ledger arithmetic supported '2' was found to be erroneous after a manual calculation, which confirms '12' shillings are required to reach the final page total. Pounds column is blank, so an empty string is used.
rows.english_description: Entry labelled 'City Watchman' recorded as a receipt.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Entry labelled 'City Watchman' recorded as a receipt, amounting to £0 12s 0d.
